changeSet.author: shvets
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO dbo.lesson (title, description) VALUES ('Introduction to Graph Theory', 'Basic concepts of graphs, vertices, and edges'), ('Directed and Weighted Graphs', 'Study of directed graphs and weighted edges'), ('Graph Traversal Algorithms', 'Overview of DFS and BFS algorithms'), ('Shortest Path Algorithms', 'Methods for finding shortest paths in graphs'), ('Minimum Spanning Trees', 'Concepts and algorithms for MST construction'), ('Connectivity in Graphs', 'Connected components and related properties'), ('Cycles and Acyclic Graphs', 'Cycles, DAGs, and their applications'), ('Graph Representations', 'Adjacency matrix, adjacency list, and incidence matrix'), ('Tree Structures', 'Basic properties and traversal of trees'), ('Bipartite Graphs', 'Definitions, properties, and examples of bipartite graphs'), ('Euler and Hamilton Paths', 'Special paths and cycles in graphs'), ('Network Flow Basics', 'Introduction to flow networks'), ('Graph Coloring', 'Vertex and edge coloring basics'), ('Topological Sorting', 'Ordering vertices in directed acyclic graphs'), ('Applications of Graphs', 'Real-world graph applications in computer science');

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM dbo.lesson WHERE title IN ( 'Introduction to Graph Theory', 'Directed and Weighted Graphs', 'Graph Traversal Algorithms', 'Shortest Path Algorithms', 'Minimum Spanning Trees', 'Connectivity in Graphs', 'Cycles and Acyclic Graphs', 'Graph Representations', 'Tree Structures', 'Bipartite Graphs', 'Euler and Hamilton Paths', 'Network Flow Basics', 'Graph Coloring', 'Topological Sorting', 'Applications of Graphs' );
